globalEvents.title: ‘Quite interested’: Trump may ask Arab countries to fund Iran war, says White House
globalEvents.detail: Karoline Leavitt said what Tehran says publicly differs from what it tells US officials in private.

globalEvents.title: Trump’s choice: Hegseth’s holy war or the pope's peace
globalEvents.detail: Pope Leo XIV’s Palm Sunday sermon warned against invoking God to justify violence.

globalEvents.title: US Iran tensions rise as ground war plans signal dangerous escalation | Explained
globalEvents.detail: US President Donald Trump is said to be considering a decisive military move, with reports suggesting that Washington has developed a “final blow” strategy against Iran. This plan is expected to combine large-scale aerial bombardment with targeted ground assaults, focusing on specific high-value locations rather than a full-scale invasion.

globalEvents.title: Rising gas prices double blow for drivers using own vehicles for work
globalEvents.detail: The Iran war has pushed up the average U.S. price for a gallon of regular gas by $1. Some companies compensate employees for using their own vehicles, including the cost of gas, but not all.

globalEvents.title: 2 criminals injured in police encounter in Dwarka
globalEvents.detail: Dwarka police encounter in Delhi leaves two injured after exchange of fire while officers tried to arrest a Dabri crime suspect; both shot in legs, hospitalized.

globalEvents.title: San Rafael man accused of arson in Marin City
globalEvents.detail: The suspect allegedly set bushes on fire near a business on Donahue Street.

globalEvents.title: Staten Island man arrested for setting multiple cars on fire
globalEvents.detail: The man was charged with arson, grand larceny and criminal mischief, according to police.

globalEvents.title: Security guard shot near NYC's Madison Square Park in broad daylight attack
globalEvents.detail: A security guard at a Manhattan shelter was shot Monday afternoon near Madison Square Park -- and police believe the assailant opened fire over an ongoing clash, law enforcement sources said.

globalEvents.title: Republican Feud Explodes Amid DHS Funding Disaster
globalEvents.detail: House Republicans reject Senate's bipartisan DHS deal, deepening GOP rift as shutdown enters a record 44th day.

globalEvents.title: Our Favorite Amazon Streaming Stick Is Almost Half Off
globalEvents.detail: The Fire TV Stick 4K Max is great for the Prime Video devout and handles other streaming services just as well.

globalEvents.title: CCCEI-branded power strips sold on Amazon recalled over fire risk
globalEvents.detail: CCCEI-branded power strips sold on Amazon are being recalled due to a fire risk that could cause serious injury or death from smoke inhalation and burns.

globalEvents.title: Greater Napanee puts new fire truck into service
globalEvents.detail: (Napanee, Ontario) On Friday, Mar. 27, 2026, MPP Ric Bresee, Greater Napanee Council members, Napanee Fire Fighters, and members of the community gathered for a Push-In Ceremony and Touch the Truck event at Greater Napanee's Fire Station 1 to celebrate the addition of a new Aerial Ladder Truck to the Fire Department’s fleet.

globalEvents.title: What's Going On With Bloom Energy Stock Monday?
globalEvents.detail: BE stock plummets 11% amid rising Iran tensions and $101 oil. Is Bloom Energy's growth story at risk? Get the full market breakdown.

globalEvents.title: Nvidia sell-off extends to third day; stock down 21% from recent peak amid market jitters
globalEvents.detail: Nvidia shares fell 1% to $166.21, marking a 6% decline in March and 21% drop from November 2025 high. Concerns over AI revenue sustainability and broader tech sell-off amid geopolitical tensions weigh on the sector, with Nasdaq 100 entering correction territory.

globalEvents.title: Stock Market: These Four Stocks Flash Strength In Weak Market
globalEvents.detail: Four stocks are near buy points in Monday's stock market as IBD's stock screener shows that their relative strength touches a new high.

globalEvents.title: Breaking Records in Robotic Surgery: Tallest Patient Undergoes Successful Knee Replacement
globalEvents.detail: A private hospital in Faridabad has successfully conducted bilateral robotic knee replacement surgery on a tall Kenyan man, potentially setting a world record. The operation, led by Dr. Anurag Aggarwal, marked a significant achievement in orthopedic care, emphasizing technology-driven healthcare and speedy patient recovery.

globalEvents.title: Faridabad hospital sets record, performs robotic knee replacement on 6’6’’ Kenyan patient
globalEvents.detail: Faridabad hospital sets record, performs robotic knee replacement on 6’6’’ Kenyan patient

globalEvents.title: Reasons to Visit 24 Hour Emergency Care in Fraser Instead of Waiting for an Appointment
globalEvents.detail: Health concerns rarely follow a convenient schedule. A sudden fever at midnight, a deep cut after dinner, or sharp chest discomfort during a weekend hike can throw everything off balance. When symptoms feel urgent,

globalEvents.title: Giving Back to the Community: Qualifacts Selects Colorado’s Mile High Behavioral Healthcare as ‘2026 Give Back’ Donation Recipient
globalEvents.detail: Qualifacts’ Give Back Program Supports Community Behavioral Health Through Mile High Behavioral Healthcare

globalEvents.title: Woman with ‘UK’s biggest boobs’ received disturbing comment from teacher
globalEvents.detail: The Scot has opened up on her rare health condition in the past

globalEvents.title: Jesy Nelson shares new update on twins, 9 months, following hospital stint where her daughters were fitted with leg splints amid their ongoing treatment for SMA
globalEvents.detail: Jesy Nelson has shared a new update on her twins on Instagram on Monday following her daughters being fitted with leg splints at Great Ormond Street Hospital.

globalEvents.title: 81 Full-Time Paraprofessionals At Risk Under Southern Ocean School Budget
globalEvents.detail: Little Egg Harbor schools are considering cutting all full-time paraprofessionals due to rising health care costs.

globalEvents.title: Tamil Nadu Election 2026: Revisiting The Last Verdict And New Ground Realities
globalEvents.detail: The ruling DMK is seeking re-election by promoting its governance record and pitching a “Dravidian Model 2.0,” while maintaining stable alliances.

globalEvents.title: First Nations child welfare deal approved by Tribunal
globalEvents.detail: The Canadian Human Rights Tribunal has approved a landmark First Nations child welfare deal between the federal government and First Nations in Ontario, partially ending a decades-long discrimination case.

globalEvents.title: Saskatchewan to ask residents for views
globalEvents.detail: Premier Scott Moe says his government is planning to ask people in Saskatchewan for their views on banning social media for children under 16.

globalEvents.title: Most Syrian refugees in Germany expected to return home in three years
globalEvents.detail: Merz’s government has taken a tougher line on refugees and migrants, amid surging support for the anti-immigration AfD party.

globalEvents.title: What’s inside the White House app?
globalEvents.detail:
According to “I Decompiled the White House’s New App,” the Android version has some odd choices for a government app that mostly shows content from the White House website.
That includes enabling location tracking and other monitoring via OneSignal’s analytics (which the company says are opt-in at the OS level), JavaScript loaded from some guy’s GitHub, an injected script to hide things like consent dialogs on pages users open in the app, and other hooks to non-government third-party services.
[Link: I Decompiled the White House's New App | https://blog.thereallo.dev/blog/decompiling-the-white-house-app | Thereallo]

globalEvents.title: More Than 700 Join Phoenixville's 'No Kings' Protest Against Trump
globalEvents.detail: Hundreds took to the streets of Phoenixville over the weekend to "demonstrate that we can fight back without violence."

globalEvents.title: Some wait times at airport bottlenecks ease as TSA says workers get their pay
globalEvents.detail: Some wait times at airport bottlenecks are easing as TSA says its workers are receiving pay for work during the partial government shutdown.

globalEvents.title: High Stakes: First Phase Nominations in West Bengal Elections
globalEvents.detail: A total of 78 nominations were submitted for the first phase of the West Bengal assembly elections, with the deadline for submissions set for April 6. Key constituencies include Nandigram with BJP's Suvendu Adhikari. The two-phase election will conclude with a vote count on May 4.

adminEvents.title: WAR/POLITICS - 2026 Mar
adminEvents.detail: Ukraine war escalation continues across Eastern Europe as multiple drone incidents were recorded across Baltic airspace in late March 2026, with at least 3 confirmed airspace violations reported by Lithuania, Latvia, and Estonia within a 48-hour window, intensifying NATO air-defense readiness along the 1,450 km eastern flank.

adminEvents.title: TECHNOLOGY - 2026 Mar
adminEvents.detail: Agentic AI transition accelerates in 2026, with over 60% of new enterprise AI deployments shifting from generative models to autonomous task-executing systems, while more than 12 major countries expand “digital sovereignty” policies aimed at controlling AI infrastructure, including GPU allocation exceeding 10,000 H100-equivalent units in national compute programs.

adminEvents.title: ECONOMIC - 2026/Mar
adminEvents.detail: Global economic fragmentation deepens as analysts describe a persistent K-shaped recovery, with household debt linked to buy-now-pay-later services exceeding double-digit annual growth rates in multiple OECD economies, while supply-chain volatility affects more than 30% of critical manufacturing inputs across semiconductor and energy sectors.
